creator: dcamp@dccjr.com
text:
After running pkg install nagios4-4.1.1_2 the printed message mentions:

"Documentation is available in HTML form
 in /usr/local/www/nagios/docs."

This is incorrect -- that directory is not created.


Expected result: /usr/local/www/nagios/docs is populated.

Suggested resolution: Place the docs xor remove the misleading language.
